title: Q screened in Toronto Canada on Nov 8th
display_title: Q screened in Toronto Canada on Nov 8th
wikitext:
[]: Q screened in Toronto, Canada on Nov 8th             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Tue Oct 22, 2013 10:22 pm http://reelasian.com/index.php/component/ohanah/evangelion-30-you-can-not-redo Japanese with English subtitles Not sure at this point if I can be bothered to go since I've rewatched my BD a billion times.

[]:             Quote Post by monitoradiation » Tue Oct 22, 2013 10:26 pm At this point, you'd be going to watch the audience reactions...

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Tue Oct 22, 2013 10:37 pm Indeed. I have zero interest in that.

[]:             Quote Post by hui43210 » Tue Oct 22, 2013 10:45 pm And I'll be in Hamilton a week earlier shucks, not that mad tho since its just a sub showing, I can see that already.

[]:             Quote Post by Warren Peace » Tue Oct 22, 2013 11:28 pm Well, no one who sees this ad is going in unspoiled.

[]:             Quote Post by monitoradiation » Tue Oct 22, 2013 11:47 pm Warren Peace wrote: Well, no one who sees this ad is going in unspoiled.

[]:             Quote Post by Stan » Wed Oct 23, 2013 10:49 am It's funny how Ornette posted the notification as Evangelion 3.0 You Can (Not) Advance on the main page ahah. I think its a typo, probably should change to you can (not) redo ;)

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Oct 23, 2013 4:35 pm Article wrote: Evangelion 3.0, like its two predecessors, were monster box-office hits in Japan, with the eagerly awaited “final chapter” set to be released sometime next year.

[]:             Quote Post by hui43210 » Wed Oct 23, 2013 5:00 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Uh? Are they just pulling stuff out of their butt or is there a credible source?

[]:             Quote Post by monitoradiation » Wed Oct 23, 2013 5:03 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Uh? Are they just pulling stuff out of their butt or is there a credible source?

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Wed Oct 23, 2013 5:30 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Uh? Are they just pulling stuff out of their butt or is there a credible source?

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Wed Oct 23, 2013 6:50 pm Well, there was that rumor a while ago: http://neweva.blog103.fc2.com/blog-entry-2325.html

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Oct 23, 2013 9:32 pm Oh yeah, I completely forgot about that! I started that thread discussion in question: http://forum.evageeks.org/thread/14683/Speculation-Eva-Final-out-Winter-2015/
